name: Beary Christmas Popcorn Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place popcorn in a very large bowl.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine marshmallows, butter and milk. Stir constantly, cooking over low heat until marshmallows are melted. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter, vanilla, and salt.
3. Pour the marshmallow mixture over the popcorn and stir until evenly coated.
4. Using lightly greased hands, press about 1/2 cup of the popcorn mixture into a bear-shaped mold.
5. Transfer the pressed mixture to wax paper.
6. Press two chocolate chips and one candy into the bear for eyes and nose.
7. Repeat with the remaining popcorn mixture.
8. Allow to cool completely. Tie ribbon around the neck of each bear.
